    D

    DiskMark - Class in edu.touro.mco152.bm
    Tracks and records progress as a disk read or write is being executed Each Mark (one timed iteration) represents a single measurement taken during a Benchmark run
    DiskMark.MarkType - Enum Class in edu.touro.mco152.bm
     

    E

    edu.touro.mco152.bm - package edu.touro.mco152.bm
    The purpose of this program is to compute and provide some performance information about the local disk drive associated with the user’s home directory.
